overall.description: A cinematic aerial fly-through of a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape, showcasing towering skyscrapers including a distinctive yellow mega-structure and the Marquess building. The camera moves smoothly forward through the urban canyon in bright morning sunlight, revealing the dense architectural details of Night City from a high vantage point.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude aerial approach over highway interchange

agents.ego_description: flying forward through open air above the city highway interchange toward the central mega-tower

entered.detail: tall yellow and black mega-structure with construction cranes on top, dominating the skyline
dark industrial complex with smoke stacks emitting gray smoke
multi-level highway interchange with visible road markings below
yellow construction cranes atop distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide aerial view of a futuristic cityscape. The camera flies forward over a highway interchange toward a massive yellow mega-tower in the distance. To the left, an industrial sector emits smoke while construction cranes dot the skyline. The scene is bathed in bright morning sunlight with clear visibility.

events.description: entering confined urban canyon between skyscrapers with buildings on both sides

agents.ego_description: navigating through the urban canyon between towering buildings with the mega-structure still ahead

entered.detail: tall black building with orange circular Marquess logo and horizontal lines
beige high-rise with external fire escapes and illuminated billboards
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a confined urban canyon between high-rise buildings. The Marquess building with its distinctive orange logo appears on the right, while a commercial tower with external fire escapes emerges on the left. The mega-tower grows larger ahead as the industrial sector fades behind. A skybridge becomes visible in the distance connecting buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower altitude street canyon approaching ground level

events.description: descending to lower altitude with street level and intersection details becoming visible

agents.ego_description: flying lower between buildings approaching street level with the mega-tower still dominant in the distance

entered.detail: urban street intersection with crosswalks and road markings visible below
palm trees lining the street at ground level

segments.scene_description: The camera descends lower into the urban canyon, bringing the street intersection and palm trees into view. The Marquess building now dominates the right side at close range, while the left commercial tower fills the left frame. The highway interchange fades behind as the camera approaches ground level, with the mega-tower remaining visible in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial descent from a wide cityscape vista into the depths of a dense urban canyon. It begins with a forward flight over a highway interchange toward a massive yellow mega-tower, passing an industrial sector filled with smoke and construction cranes under bright morning sunlight. As the camera pushes forward, the open horizon narrows into a confined corridor of high-rises, where the Marquess building with its orange logo emerges on the right and a commercial tower with external fire escapes appears on the left. The scene then shifts as the camera descends lower, leaving the highway behind to reveal a street intersection and palm trees below. Finally, the view tightens as the surrounding skyscrapers fill the frame at close range while the distant mega-tower remains a focal point ahead.
